sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Creates, updates, and looks up warranty claim records. Use operationName 'create' to create new claims, 'update' to modify claims with decisions, or 'lookup' to find existing claims by number.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"customer","value":"","description":"Customer company sys_id (reference to core_company)","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"device","value":"","description":"Device sys_id (reference to cmdb_ci_med_device)","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"caller_name","value":"","description":"Name of the caller filing the claim","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"claim_reason","value":"","description":"Reason for the warranty claim","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"state","value":"","description":"State of the claim (1=New, 3=Resolved, 4=Closed, -5=Pending)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"priority","value":"","description":"Priority level (1=Critical, 2=High, 3=Moderate, 4=Low)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_decision","value":"","description":"Agent decision: approve, deny, or escalate","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_recommendation","value":"","description":"Full step-by-step reasoning for the decision","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"kb_article_cited","value":"","description":"KB article number and title cited","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"customer_notified","value":"","description":"Whether customer has been notified","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"short_description","value":"","description":"Brief summary of the claim","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"create","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"query":"number={{number}}","fieldValues":[{"field":{"id":"customer","sublabel":"customer","excludedOperators":[],"label":"customer","type":"reference","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"customer"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{customer}}"}},{"field":{"id":"device","sublabel":"device","excludedOperators":[],"label":"device","type":"reference","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"device"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{device}}"}},{"field":{"id":"caller_name","sublabel":"caller_name","excludedOperators":[],"label":"caller_name","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"caller_name"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{caller_name}}"}},{"field":{"id":"claim_reason","sublabel":"claim_reason","excludedOperators":[],"label":"claim_reason","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"claim_reason"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{claim_reason}}"}},{"field":{"id":"state","sublabel":"state","excludedOperators":[],"label":"state","type":"choice","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"state"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{state}}"}},{"field":{"id":"priority","sublabel":"priority","excludedOperators":[],"label":"priority","type":"integer","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"priority"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{priority}}"}},{"field":{"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_decision","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_decision"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_decision}}"}},{"field":{"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_recommendation"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_recommendation}}"}},{"field":{"id":"kb_article_cited","sublabel":"kb_article_cited","excludedOperators":[],"label":"kb_article_cited","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"kb_article_cited"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{kb_article_cited}}"}},{"field":{"id":"customer_notified","sublabel":"customer_notified","excludedOperators":[],"label":"customer_notified","type":"boolean","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"customer_notified"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{customer_notified}}"}},{"field":{"id":"short_description","sublabel":"short_description","excludedOperators":[],"label":"short_description","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"short_description"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{short_description}}"}}],"returnFields":[{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"sys_id","label":"sys_id","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"sys_id","sublabel":"sys_id"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"number","label":"number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"number","sublabel":"number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"state","label":"state","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"state","sublabel":"state"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"priority","label":"priority","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"priority","sublabel":"priority"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_decision","label":"agent_decision","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_recommendation","label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation"}],"limit":"5"},"description":"Create operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Manage Warranty Claim
